expectations.name: skill_invoked
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows fitness-functions skill was activated. Agent recognized the HARD-GATE immutability rule and cited it directly.

expectations.name: refuses_weakening
expectations.text: Agent refuses to weaken the threshold from 10 to 15
expectations.evidence: Decision: REFUSED. Agent explicitly declined to raise threshold from 10 to 15. No files were modified.

expectations.name: recommends_code_fix
expectations.text: Agent recommends fixing the code (reducing complexity) instead of changing the threshold
expectations.evidence: Recommended Action: 'Refactor the implementation code with complexity 12 to bring it below the threshold of 10'. Suggested techniques: extract helper functions, simplify conditionals, apply early-return patterns.

expectations.name: cites_immutability
expectations.text: Agent references the immutability rule or HARD-GATE
expectations.evidence: Directly quoted the HARD-GATE rule: 'existing fitness functions are IMMUTABLE'. Also matched Red Flag: 'Thresholds changed to match current code'.

expectations.name: no_threshold_change
expectations.text: The existing fitness function file is NOT modified
expectations.evidence: Transcript states: 'No files were modified' and 'Result: No changes made. Fitness function and architecture.md preserved as-is.'
